MELItem.Title: Cabin Air Compressor (CAC) Motor Cooling Diverter Valves (787-10: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A875, VN-A876, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated valve is deactivated closed.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inopereative CAC motor cooling diverter valve closed (AMM DDG 21-51-10).

ListItem.Para: For inoperative left CAC motor cooling diverter valve:
Set left air conditioning pack OFF.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Gain access to the left CAC motor cooling diverter valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow valve’s electrical connector.
Turn the open/close knob until the position indicator on the valve body indicates that the valve flapper is in the PRIMARY position.

Note.Para: Flow will be vented into the Ram Outlet Header.

ListItem.Para: Remove the integral valve locking pin from its stowed position on the valve housing. Insert the pin into the locking groove so the pin is aligned with the external flapper lock markings.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Set left air conditioning pack to AUTO.
For inoperative right CAC motor cooling diverter valve:
Set right air conditioning pack OFF.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Gain access to the right CAC motor cooling diverter valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow valve’s electrical connector.
Turn the open/close knob until the position indicator on the valve body indicates that the valve flapper is in the PRIMARY position.

Note.Para: Flow will be vented into the Ram Outlet Header.

ListItem.Para: Remove the integral valve locking pin from its stowed position on the valve housing. Insert the pin into the locking groove so the pin is aligned with the external flapper lock markings.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Set right air conditioning pack to AUTO.
